description: Ground-truth risk scores for 30 contract evaluation samples. Manually labelled based on CUAD clause patterns and standard SaaS contract risk framework.

contracts.name: Uncapped Liability SaaS Agreement
contracts.contract_text:
SAAS SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

This Software as a Service Agreement ('Agreement') is entered into between TechVendor Inc. ('Vendor') and ClientCorp LLC ('Client').

1. LIABILITY: IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY'S LIABILITY BE LIMITED. EACH PARTY SHALL BE FULLY LIABLE FOR ALL DAMAGES, LOSSES, AND EXPENSES ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT WITHOUT ANY MONETARY CAP OR RESTRICTION.

2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY: All work product created by Vendor under this Agreement shall remain the exclusive property of Vendor. Client receives a non-exclusive license to use the software during the subscription term only.

3. INDEMNIFICATION: Client shall defend, indemnify and hold harmless Vendor from and against any and all claims, damages, losses, costs and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or relating to Client's use of the software.

4. TERM: This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least 7 days prior to the end of the then-current term.

5. GOVERNING LAW: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.

contracts.name: Clean Mutual NDA
contracts.contract_text:
MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Mutual NDA is entered into between Alpha Corp and Beta Inc.

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION: Each party may disclose Confidential Information to the other solely for evaluating a potential business relationship.

2. OBLIGATIONS: Each party agrees to: (a) hold Confidential Information in strict confidence; (b) not disclose to third parties without prior written consent; (c) use only for evaluation purposes.

3. TERM: Confidentiality obligations survive for 3 years from disclosure date.

4. LIABILITY: Each party's liability for breach of this NDA shall not exceed $50,000.

5. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

6. EXCEPTIONS: Obligations do not apply to information that is publicly available, independently developed, or required by law to be disclosed.

contracts.name: Broad Indemnification + Uncapped Liability
contracts.contract_text:
MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

1. INDEMNIFICATION: Vendor shall indemnify, defend and hold harmless Client and its officers, directors, employees, agents, successors and assigns from and against any and all claims, suits, proceedings, losses, liabilities, damages, costs and expenses of any nature whatsoever (including without limitation attorneys' fees) arising out of or relating to: (a) Vendor's performance under this Agreement; (b) any act or omission of Vendor; (c) any third-party claims; (d) any breach of representations or warranties.

2. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: THERE SHALL BE NO LIMITATION ON EITHER PARTY'S LIABILITY UNDER THIS AGREEMENT. ALL DAMAGES INCLUDING CONSEQUENTIAL, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE RECOVERABLE.

3. IP ASSIGNMENT: All inventions, improvements, and work product created by Vendor shall be assigned to Client upon creation.

4. GOVERNING LAW: California, USA.

contracts.name: Standard SaaS with Capped Liability
contracts.contract_text:
SAAS AGREEMENT

1. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: EACH PARTY'S TOTAL CUMULATIVE LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THIS AGREEMENT SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES PAID BY CLIENT IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS IMMEDIATELY PRECEDING THE CLAIM.

2. IP OWNERSHIP: Vendor retains all right, title and interest in the Software. Client owns all data uploaded to the platform.

3. TERM AND RENEWAL: Initial term of 12 months. Automatic renewal for successive 12-month terms unless either party provides 60 days written notice prior to end of term.

4. INDEMNIFICATION: Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims arising from infringement of intellectual property rights.

5. GOVERNING LAW: New York, USA.

contracts.name: No IP Assignment in Services Contract
contracts.contract_text:
SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT

Vendor agrees to develop custom software for Client.

1. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY: Vendor retains all intellectual property rights in all work product, code, designs and deliverables created under this Agreement. Client receives a perpetual, non-exclusive license to use the deliverables.

2. LIABILITY: Vendor's liability shall not exceed $10,000 total.

3. CONFIDENTIALITY: Each party shall maintain confidentiality of the other's information for 2 years.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Texas, USA.

contracts.name: GDPR Non-Compliant Data Processing
contracts.contract_text:
DATA PROCESSING AGREEMENT

1. DATA PROCESSING: Vendor may process Client's customer personal data for any purpose Vendor deems appropriate, including sharing with third parties for marketing purposes without Client consent.

2. DATA RETENTION: Vendor will retain all personal data indefinitely.

3. SECURITY: Vendor will implement reasonable security measures at its discretion.

4. LIABILITY: Total liability capped at $5,000.

5. GOVERNING LAW: European Union (GDPR applicable).

contracts.name: Anti-Assignment with Change of Control
contracts.contract_text:
ENTERPRISE LICENSE AGREEMENT

1. ANTI-ASSIGNMENT: Neither party may assign this Agreement without prior written consent of the other party. Any change of control of Client (including merger, acquisition, or sale of substantially all assets) shall be deemed an assignment requiring Vendor consent.

2. LIABILITY: Liability capped at 2x annual fees paid.

3. IP: Client owns all custom developments; Vendor retains platform IP.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

5. TERM: 3-year initial term with 90-day mutual termination notice.

contracts.name: Auto-Renewal 7-Day Notice Trap
contracts.contract_text:
SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

1. TERM: This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues for one (1) year. It shall automatically renew for successive one-year periods UNLESS either party delivers written notice of non-renewal no later than SEVEN (7) DAYS before the end of the current term.

2. FEES: Upon renewal, fees increase by up to 15% annually at Vendor's discretion.

3. LIABILITY: Capped at 1x annual subscription fees.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Not specified.

contracts.name: Balanced Partnership Agreement
contracts.contract_text:
RESELLER PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT

1. LIABILITY: Each party's liability capped at $250,000 or fees paid in prior 12 months, whichever is greater. Consequential damages excluded.

2. IP: Each party retains its pre-existing IP. Joint developments owned jointly with each party having right to commercialise.

3. TERM: 2-year initial term. Renewal requires 90-day written notice and mutual agreement.

4. INDEMNIFICATION: Mutual indemnification for IP infringement claims only.

5. GOVERNING LAW: England and Wales.

contracts.name: Unlimited Consequential Damages
contracts.contract_text:
MASTER CLOUD SERVICES AGREEMENT

1. DAMAGES: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary, Client shall be liable for all direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary and punitive damages arising from Client's use of the services, with no cap or limitation whatsoever.

2. GOVERNING LAW: California, USA.

3. INDEMNIFICATION: Client indemnifies Vendor against all third-party claims without limitation.

contracts.name: Perpetual Exclusivity Lock-in
contracts.contract_text:
DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT

1. EXCLUSIVITY: During the term of this Agreement and for 3 years thereafter, Vendor grants Client exclusive distribution rights in North America. Vendor shall not, directly or indirectly, distribute, license, or sell its products to any other party in the Territory.

2. LIABILITY: Capped at $100,000.

3. TERM: 5 years, non-renewable without mutual written agreement.

4. GOVERNING LAW: New York, USA.

contracts.name: Missing Governing Law + Short Renewal
contracts.contract_text:
SERVICES AGREEMENT

1. SERVICES: Provider agrees to provide consulting services as described in each Statement of Work.

2. PAYMENT: Client shall pay invoices within 30 days. Late payments accrue interest at 2% monthly.

3. TERM: This Agreement renews automatically every 90 days unless terminated with 5 days notice.

4. CONFIDENTIALITY: Each party shall keep confidential information of the other party for 1 year.

5. LIABILITY: Neither party's liability shall exceed $25,000.

contracts.name: Source Code Escrow + Strong IP Assignment
contracts.contract_text:
ENTERPRISE SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT

1. IP ASSIGNMENT: Vendor hereby irrevocably assigns to Client all right, title and interest in all work product, including all copyrights, patents, trade secrets and other IP rights.

2. SOURCE CODE ESCROW: Vendor shall deposit source code with an escrow agent. Upon Vendor insolvency, Client may release and use the source code.

3. LIABILITY: Capped at total fees paid under this Agreement (minimum $500,000).

4. INDEMNIFICATION: Mutual, limited to direct damages from IP infringement only.

5. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

contracts.name: Non-Compete Post-Term
contracts.contract_text:
CONSULTING AGREEMENT

1. NON-COMPETE: For a period of 2 years following termination of this Agreement, Consultant shall not directly or indirectly engage in any business that competes with Client in any market where Client operates globally.

2. LIABILITY: Capped at total fees paid.

3. IP: All work product is work-for-hire and belongs to Client.

4. GOVERNING LAW: New York, USA.

contracts.name: Critical: All Risk Factors Present
contracts.contract_text:
VENDOR AGREEMENT

1. LIABILITY: Vendor and Client shall each be fully and unlimitedly liable for all damages of any kind arising from this Agreement.

2. IP: Vendor retains all intellectual property. No assignment to Client.

3. INDEMNIFICATION: Client shall indemnify Vendor against any and all claims worldwide, including attorney fees, without limitation.

4. RENEWAL: Auto-renews every year with 3-day cancellation window.

5. NON-COMPETE: Client shall not work with any competing vendor for 3 years post-termination globally.

6. NO GOVERNING LAW SPECIFIED.

contracts.name: India DPDP Act Non-Compliance
contracts.contract_text:
DATA SERVICES AGREEMENT (India Operations)

1. DATA PROCESSING: Vendor may collect, store and process all personal data of Indian users for product improvement, analytics and third-party sharing without separate consent.

2. DATA LOCALISATION: Data may be transferred to servers outside India without restriction.

3. LIABILITY: Capped at INR 50,000 (approximately $600 USD).

4. GOVERNING LAW: India.

contracts.name: Reasonable SaaS Agreement
contracts.contract_text:
SAAS SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

1. LIABILITY: Each party's total liability capped at 12 months of fees paid. No consequential damages.

2. IP: Vendor owns platform. Customer owns its data. Custom configurations owned by Customer.

3. RENEWAL: 12-month terms. 60-day written notice required to cancel.

4. INDEMNIFICATION: Vendor indemnifies Customer for IP infringement. Customer indemnifies Vendor for data content violations.

5. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

6. SECURITY: SOC 2 Type II compliance maintained.

contracts.name: MFN + Audit Rights Overreach
contracts.contract_text:
STRATEGIC VENDOR AGREEMENT

1. MOST FAVOURED NATION: Vendor warrants that fees charged to Client are no higher than those charged to any other customer. If Vendor offers lower pricing, Client shall receive automatic retroactive adjustment.

2. AUDIT RIGHTS: Client may audit Vendor's books, records, personnel, systems, and facilities at any time with 24 hours notice, for any reason related or unrelated to this Agreement.

3. LIABILITY: Capped at $1,000,000.

4. GOVERNING LAW: California, USA.

contracts.name: Liquidated Damages Overreach
contracts.contract_text:
SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT

1. LIQUIDATED DAMAGES: For each hour of downtime exceeding SLA thresholds, Vendor shall pay Client $50,000 per hour as liquidated damages, regardless of actual loss suffered.

2. LIABILITY: Liability otherwise capped at $500,000 per year.

3. IP: Jointly owned.

4. GOVERNING LAW: England and Wales.

contracts.name: Simple NDA - Low Risk
contracts.contract_text:
ONE-WAY NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Discloser: Innovate Corp. Recipient: Evaluate Inc.

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION: Technical specifications shared for evaluation purposes only.

2. TERM: 2 years from execution.

3. LIABILITY: Recipient's liability for breach capped at $25,000.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

5. REMEDIES: Injunctive relief available in addition to monetary damages.

contracts.name: Revenue Share with Vague Definition
contracts.contract_text:
REVENUE SHARING AGREEMENT

1. REVENUE SHARE: Partner receives 30% of 'Net Revenue' from referred customers. Net Revenue is defined at Company's sole discretion and may be adjusted quarterly.

2. AUDIT: Partner may request revenue reports annually.

3. LIABILITY: Each party's liability capped at $100,000.

4. GOVERNING LAW: New York, USA.

contracts.name: Uncapped + No Jurisdiction
contracts.contract_text:
PLATFORM AGREEMENT

1. LIABILITY: Unlimited liability for all parties for all causes of action.

2. INDEMNIFICATION: Mutual unlimited indemnification for all claims.

3. IP: Unclear - not specified in this agreement.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Not specified. Disputes to be resolved by arbitration at a location chosen by the claimant.

contracts.name: Termination Penalty Heavy
contracts.contract_text:
LONG-TERM SERVICE AGREEMENT

1. TERM: 5-year non-cancellable term.

2. EARLY TERMINATION: If Client terminates before the end of the 5-year term for any reason, Client shall pay 100% of remaining contract value as a termination fee.

3. LIABILITY: Capped at total contract value.

4. GOVERNING LAW: California, USA.

contracts.name: Open Source Compliant License
contracts.contract_text:
SOFTWARE LICENSE AGREEMENT

1. LICENSE: Vendor grants Client a perpetual, irrevocable, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, modify, and distribute the software.

2. IP: Client retains all modifications and derivative works.

3. LIABILITY: Capped at $50,000.

4. WARRANTY DISCLAIMER: Software provided AS IS with no warranties.

5. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

contracts.name: Joint Development - IP Complexity
contracts.contract_text:
JOINT DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT

1. JOINT IP: All inventions, discoveries, and improvements created jointly shall be jointly owned. Each party shall have the right to license joint IP to third parties without consent of the other party and without accounting.

2. BACKGROUND IP: Each party retains its background IP.

3. LIABILITY: Each party capped at $2,000,000.

4. GOVERNING LAW: England and Wales.

contracts.name: ROFR Blocking Exit
contracts.contract_text:
INVESTOR RIGHTS AGREEMENT

1. RIGHT OF FIRST REFUSAL: In the event Company seeks to raise additional funding, existing investor has the right of first refusal on any new shares at the offered price. Company must provide 45 days notice.

2. DRAG-ALONG: If 60% of shareholders approve a sale, all shareholders must participate.

3. LIABILITY: Disputes subject to arbitration in New York.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

contracts.name: Critical SaaS: Uncapped + No IP + GDPR
contracts.contract_text:
ENTERPRISE PLATFORM AGREEMENT

1. LIABILITY: UNLIMITED. No cap of any kind applies to either party.

2. DATA: Vendor may process and transfer EU personal data to any country without restriction and share with advertising partners.

3. IP: All outputs, models trained on Customer data, and insights derived belong to Vendor.

4. INDEMNIFICATION: Customer indemnifies Vendor against all claims worldwide.

5. GOVERNING LAW: Not specified.

contracts.name: Insurance Requirement Overreach
contracts.contract_text:
VENDOR SERVICES AGREEMENT

1. INSURANCE: Vendor shall maintain at all times: (a) Commercial General Liability: $10,000,000 per occurrence; (b) Professional Liability: $5,000,000; (c) Cyber Liability: $5,000,000; (d) Workers Compensation: statutory limits.

2. LIABILITY: Capped at $500,000.

3. IP: All work product assigned to Client.

4. GOVERNING LAW: California, USA.

contracts.name: Warranty Duration + Support Trap
contracts.contract_text:
SOFTWARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

1. WARRANTY: Vendor warrants the software will function as documented for 5 years. Vendor must fix all bugs within 24 hours of report.

2. SUPPORT: Vendor must provide 24/7 support with 15-minute response SLA for 5 years at no additional cost.

3. LIABILITY: Uncapped for warranty breaches. Otherwise capped at purchase price.

4. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA.

contracts.name: Well-Negotiated Enterprise Agreement
contracts.contract_text:
MASTER SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

1. LIABILITY: Each party's liability capped at greater of (a) 2x annual fees or (b) $1,000,000. Consequential damages excluded except for confidentiality breaches.

2. IP: Vendor owns platform and underlying technology. Customer owns its data and custom configurations. Any AI models trained exclusively on Customer data are owned by Customer.

3. RENEWAL: 12-month terms. 90-day notice to cancel. Price increases capped at 5% annually.

4. INDEMNIFICATION: Mutual, limited to IP infringement and data privacy violations.

5. GOVERNING LAW: Delaware, USA. Disputes by AAA arbitration.

6. SECURITY: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001 compliance. Breach notification within 72 hours.
